---
title: "Linkedin"
subtitle: "Platform Evaluation Report"
ugc_answers_file: "data/2025/regional/BR/linkedin/ugc.yml"
ads_answers_file: "data/2025/regional/BR/linkedin/ads.yml"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

from utils.quarto_helpers import load_platform_results

results_ugc, results_ads = load_platform_results(
    ugc_file="data/2025/regional/BR/linkedin/ugc.yml",
    ads_file="data/2025/regional/BR/linkedin/ads.yml",
    year='2025'
)

```

**User-generated transparency score:** `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_score']:.0f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_max']:.0f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ugc['total_percentage']:.0f}"`%)

**Advertising transparency score:** `{python} f"{results_ads['total_score']:.0f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ads['total_max']:.0f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ads['total_percentage']:.0f}"`%)


## Executive Summary

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.

## User-Generated Content Summary

```{python}
#| label: ugc-summary-table
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.quarto_helpers import generate_summary_table
generate_summary_table(results_ugc)
```

## Advertising Summary

```{python}
#| label: ads-summary-table
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

generate_summary_table(results_ads)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
